titleStmt.title: SII 39.102: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 102. (A.R. No. 102 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALL ON THE SAME TEMPLE. MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRASUNDARA PĀ[Ṇ*]ḌYADĒVĀ, ‘WHO HAVING TAKEN THE CHŌḺA COUNTRY, 20+1ST = 21ST YEAR (1236 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of land in the village of Muṉṉaikkuḍi in Puṟamalaināḍu to the same temple by the Maṟavās of Vēlaṅguḍi in Pūṅguṉṟanāḍu. The order (ōlai) of Vikramasiṅgaṉ was written in continuation of the record and signed by Teṉṉavadaraiyaṉ which states that the gift was to be utilized for the service of Vīramiṇḍaṉ-sandi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟu paṉmarrāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ coṇāṭu
koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻapurattu virāabhiṣekam paṇṇiya
ruḷiya virasundrapāṇṭiya devaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10- vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu puṟama
lai nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār śivadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya
nāyaṉār Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟkku puṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu velaṅkuṭi maṟava
ril puṟamalai nāṭṭu muṉṉaikkuṭi vayalluṭaiya Aṉaivomum muṉṉai
kkuṭi vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟumuṟṟukkum perunāṉ kellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟ
kellai Oḷikaḷ maṟṟāya yiṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉatukkum nakula maṇṭala
peraiyaṉ kuṭikāṭṭukku meṟkum teṉpāṟk kellai koṟṟa
maṅkalattuk kuḷattu nirnakkalukku vaṭakkum vayakkal teṉvarampukkum
ṉ vaykkal teṉ varampukkum coṟuṇṭai vayalil kaṭaṉā
ce varampukku vaṭakkum melpāṟk kellai māṅkuṭik kuḷatti
ṉ kiḻakkaṭaiyil maṇṇiṭṭukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai muṉ
ṉaik kuṭikkuḷattil nirnakkalukku teṟkum Āka vicainta perunāṉ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum kuḷamum kuḷavāyt talaiyum nattamum
nattappāḻḻum nañcey puñceyum meṉokkiya maramum kiṉokkiya
kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa Emmillicainta vilai
p poruḷukku vilaikkuṟaviṟṟup poruḷḷaṟak koṇṭu nāṉkellai
yilum Ūṟkku naṭuvuṭ tiruccūlak kallu nāṭṭik kuṭuttom yivayalil
kāṇi Uṭaiya Aṉaivomum mutalikaḷḷum Eṅkaḷ ṉāyaṉār tirukko
ḷakkuṭi śrīvayarmmiśvaramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār Ādicaṇḍeśvaravaṟkku Ippaṭi
kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom muṉcollappaṭṭa Aṉai
vomum øpanmāheśvarakṣaiya- vikkirama coḻa nāṭāḻvāṉum Ālā
la cuntiranāṭāḻvāṉum Accanārāyaṇap peraiyaṉum paḻiyañcip peraiyaṉum
puṟamalai nāṭṭup peraiyaṉum nakulaciṅkap peraiyaṉum A
raca kopālap peraiyaṉum yivvaṉaivar sajraimāṭṭeṟinte
ṉ kāṉaṉāṭṭuk kaṇakku cuntarat toḷḷuṭaiyāṉ coṟuṭaiyā
ṉ Eḻuttu maṇṭala māṇikkap peraiyaṉ Eḻuttu vāṇarāyar ta
ṟkuṟiyum Iṭṭu Ippaṭikku Ivai nakala nāṭāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Itu pā
ṇṭimāṉ taṟkuṟiyum Atirattaraiyaṉ taṟkuṟiyum taṟkuṟiyum yiraṭṭaipāṭi ko
ṇṭāṉ taṟkuṟiyum kulapatirāyaṉ taṟkuṟiyum māṭṭeṟinteṉraṉāti ma
ṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu kopālarāyaṉ taṟku
ṟi māṭṭeṟinteṉ kumāramaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ perumāḷ nampi Eḻuttu
vaiyyakattaraiyaṉ taṟkuṟiyum Ayilaimāṉ taṟkuṟiyum māṭṭeṟi
nteṉ poṉṉamarāpati paṭaikkaṇakkaṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉ ta
ppil veḷḷuraṉ Eḻuttu Itu virakaṅkaṉ taṟkuṟi māṭṭeṟinteṉ kā
ḷaiyar kālapperunteruvil Okkūruṭaiyāṉ paṉaiyaṉ kūttaṉā
ṉāṉa ceḻiya taṉañciyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ariyāṉ
pimaṉāṉa piḷḷaimāṉ Eḻuttu

vikkira ciṅkatevaṉ Ōlaitirukko
ḷakkuṭit tāṉattāraṟkku pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu velaṅkuṭi maṟavaril
puṟamalaināṭṭu muṉṉaikkuṭivayal Uṭaiya yivarkaḷ yiṉnāṭṭu
tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār śrī śivadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār
kkum cuṟṟum muṟṟum vayalum nāyaṉāṟkku kārāṇaṭai
meyyāṭcci viṟṟa vilaippaṭiye vilaiyāvutākavum muṉṉaikkuṭiyi
yirukkum kuṭimakkaḷ muṉpu yiṟuttu varum yiṟuppakaḷḷum kuṟai teṇ
ṭamum veṭṭittevaiyum Āka potumakkaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟappaṭṭa
ṉavum Uṭpaṭa viramiṇṭaṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi pūccupaṭi tiru
viḷakkeṇṇaippaṭi nivantak kāṟṟakkum maṟṟum Amutupaṭi Uṭpaṭa
veṇṭum veñceṉaṅkaḷukkum Ivvūrum vayalum kuḷamum vaḷaiyiṟ cu
ṟṟu muṟṟum tiruccūla kallu nāṭṭik kuṭuttu viramiṇṭaṉ cantikku cantirā
ttavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka
Ivai vikkaramaciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 2 10 vatiṉ Etirāmāṇ
teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
